name: Rohit Singh
title: Senior Software Engineer - AI/LLM
summary: Innovative Senior Software Engineer with 4.11 years of experience in AI-driven enhancements and large language models. Developed SentimentIQ leveraging GPT-5, achieving an 85% reduction in manual feedback analysis and real-time processing of over 10,000 responses. Seeking to elevate technological solutions by integrating advanced prompt engineering techniques and retrieval-augmented generation in future projects.

highlights: Developed SentimentIQ using advanced prompt engineering techniques with OpenAI GPT-5 and Claude LLMs, implementing RAG architecture and MongoDB vector embeddings, reducing manual feedback analysis by 85% and enabling real-time processing of 10,000+ customer responses into instant business insights.

Developed a search service transforming data from technical websites, files, and SharePoint into a unified semantic search platform using ML techniques and a Cosmos vector database. Indexed over 10,000 files with search times under 5 seconds.

Developed a Chatbot using Retrieval-Augmented Generation and LangChain to integrate Azure OpenAI services, converting data into embeddings and storing in Cosmos DB. Enhanced search response speed by up to 80%.
Developed an automated reporting tool for GitHub repositories using Python, GitHub APIs, and GraphQL, improving visibility across 100,000+ repositories.
Migrated schema and data from TigerGraph (Graph DB) to MySQL (Relational DB), saving $10k per month in licensing costs.

projects.title: SentimentIQ - AI powered Feedback Intelligence Platform
projects.description: Engineered advanced prompt engineering strategies for OpenAI GPT-5 and Claude. Implemented RAG architecture using MongoDB Atlas vector embeddings. Built scalable Flask API with real-time session management.
